storylets.title: {=patron_troop_loan_title}Steel from {LORD_NAME}'s muster
storylets.setup: {=patron_troop_loan_setup}{LORD_NAME} laughs at the request, then doesn't. "You want my men. For your road." He thinks for a moment. "My captain at the muster yard answers to my seal. I will write you in. He will not love it. Choose what you take."

options.text: {=patron_troop_loan_two_picks}Two of your veterans, lord. For one campaign.
options.tooltip: {=patron_troop_loan_two_picks_tt}+2000 denars in equipment credit. -2 relation. Patron's captain will remember the imposition.

options.text: {=patron_troop_loan_one_pick}Only one. Half the favor. Half the debt.
{=patron_troop_loan_own}Forget it, lord. I'd rather lean on my own.
options.tooltip: {=patron_troop_loan_own_tt}+5 relation. He approves of the self-reliance.
